Killeen, Texas · Good Food. Good Drinks. Good Company.

Cold Menu

Charcuterie Board

$16

Beef Carpaccio

Thinly sliced beef, arugula, capers, shaved parmesan, truffle oil & lemon dressing.

$19

Caprese Burrata

Creamy burrata, cherry tomatoes, fresh basil, balsamic glaze & extra virgin olive oil.

$16

Smoked Salmon Rolls

Smoked salmon wrapped with cucumber, cream cheese, dill & capers.

$15

Marinated Olives

$8

Spiced Almonds
